function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap (tree/read/context), read nested AGENTS.MD in entered folders, resolved informal role reference via canonical cast record, then searched projects by structured alias identifier.
function.outcome_justification: `10_entities/cast/elena.md` identifies the CEO as Elena with alias `elena`. Searching project records for that identifier found `40_projects/2026_04_18_dockflow_exception_radar/README.MD`, whose linked_entities contains `entity.elena`; its canonical project name is `Dockflow Exception Radar`.
